---
title: "executor.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\engine\executor.py"
loc: 42
complexity: 6
logic_score: 6.25
style_score: 3.69
intel_score: 9.02
overall_score: 5.02
---

## Intent
The `executor.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on SovereignExecutor, __init__, handle_proactive, suggest_forge, handle_cortex_query. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignExecutor, __init__, handle_proactive, suggest_forge, handle_cortex_query. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.engine.cortex](file://src.core.engine.cortex)
- [src.core.engine.skill_forger](file://src.core.engine.skill_forger)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)

### Exports
- `SovereignExecutor`
- `__init__`
- `handle_proactive`
- `suggest_forge`
- `handle_cortex_query`
